prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2024年理科最低位次约3215→3020→8174（2023年异常断档）→3143，排除2023年断档后，近3年正常位次在3020–3215区间窄幅波动，2024年基准约3143名。2 025年青海省首次实行新高考（物理类/历史类），位次体系转换，但物理类竞争结构与原理科相近；理科计划2021年46人→2022年48人→2023年51人→2024年50人 ，呈小幅扩招趋势；2026年物理类计划57人，较2024年理科50人增加7人（+14%），扩招幅度明显，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2 021年第76位持续上升至2026年第69位，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；2022年声誉评价为偏负面（学术不端事件），但近年 声誉趋于平稳；抖音热度总排名第75位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量中等，未见明显报考热度异常信号；投档异常文件中无该校断档记录，报考心理稳定；作 物学A-、植物保护A-、畜牧学A-、草学A-，共4个A-学科，在农林类高校中实力突出，与招生专业中的农学类、植物保护、动物科学等高度对应，对农林方向考生有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校位于陕西咸阳，与青海省地理位置较近，属西北地区高校，对青海考生有天然地域亲和力；计算机类、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，该校电气工程、计算机类等专业录取位次靠前；农林类相关专业（农学、植物保护等）社 会热度一般，但作为985平台仍有吸引力；青海省2026年普通高考总人数48000人，较2025年物理类30457人+历史类17212人=47669人略有增加，竞争小幅加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024年基准位次3143名、2026年物理类计划扩招至57人（较2024年理科50人扩招14%）、 软科排名持续上升至第69位、青海省考生总数小幅增加等因素，扩招对位次的向下拉动（位次数字增大=更易进）与排名上升、考生增加对位次的向上推动（位次数字减小=更难进 ）相互对冲。扩招幅度（14%）大于考生增幅（约1%），预计竞争略有缓解，预测最低位次约3190名，区间2690–3690名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum ranking for science subjects was approximately 3215 → 3020 → 8174 (abnormal gap in 2023) → 3143. Excluding the 2023 gap, the normal ranking in the past three years fluctuated narrowly between 3020 and 3215, with a baseline of about 3143 in 2024. In 2025, Qinghai Province implemented the new college entrance examination for the first time (Physics Category/History Category), leading to a ranking system transition, but the competitive structure of the Physics Category is similar to that of the former science subjects. The science enrollment plan was 46 in 2021 → 48 in 2022 → 51 in 2023 → 50 in 2024, showing a slight expansion trend. In 2026, the Physics Category enrollment plan is 57, an increase of 7 (+14%) compared to 50 in 2024, indicating a significant expansion and slightly eased competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 76th in 2021 to 69th in 2026, reflecting the university's enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In 2022, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (due to academic misconduct incidents), but in recent years, the reputation has stabilized. The overall Douyin popularity ranking is 75th, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure and no obvious abnormal signals in application enthusiasm. There are no records of enrollment gaps in the abnormal filing documents, indicating stable application psychology. The university has four A- disciplines: Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Science, and Grassland Science, demonstrating outstanding strength in agricultural and forestry universities, which closely correspond to enrollment majors such as Agriculture, Plant Protection, and Animal Science, providing stable appeal to candidates interested in agriculture and forestry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Xianyang, Shaanxi, geographically close to Qinghai Province, belonging to universities in the northwest region, offering natural regional affinity to Qinghai candidates. Engineering majors such as Computer Science and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to have high social popularity, with admission rankings for these majors at the forefront. Agriculture and forestry-related majors (e.g., Agriculture, Plant Protection) have average social popularity but still attract candidates due to the 985 platform. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the regular college entrance examination in Qinghai Province is 48,000, a slight increase from 47,669 in 2025 (30,457 in Physics Category + 17,212 in History Category), leading to a minor intensification of competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2024 baseline ranking of 3143, the expansion of the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan to 57 (a 14% increase from 50 in 2024), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking to 69th, and the slight increase in the total number of candidates in Qinghai Province, the downward pull on rankings (larger ranking number = easier admission) from enrollment expansion and the upward push on rankings (smaller ranking number = harder admission) from ranking improvement and increased candidates offset each other. The expansion rate (14%) is greater than the candidate growth rate (approximately 1%), so competition is expected to slightly ease. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3190, with a range of 2690 to 3690.

- Agriculture (Agricultural Sciences)

- Mechanical Engineering

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2690–3690, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2690), you can focus on competitive majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science. If your ranking is close to the upper limit (>3690), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors to secure admission to the 985 platform.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum ranking for liberal arts fluctuated significantly: approximately 609 → 1297 → 882 → 688. In 2022, the ranking dropped sharply to 1297, then gradually recovered to 882 → 688 in 2023–2024, with a baseline of about 688 in 2024. In 2025, Qinghai Province implemented the new college entrance examination for the first time (History Category), leading to a ranking system transition. The liberal arts enrollment plan decreased from 6 in 2021 to 6 in 2022, 4 in 2023, and 4 in 2024, showing a shrinking trend. In 2026, the History Category plan is 6, an increase of 2 (+50%) compared to 4 in 2024 for liberal arts, a significant expansion that notably eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 76th in 2021 to 69th in 2026. In 2022, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (academic misconduct incident), but it has stabilized in recent years. Douyin popularity ranks 75th overall, rated as 'average', with no abnormal application heat. The university's A- disciplines are all in agriculture and forestry; liberal arts majors (Law, Public Administration, Russian) lack direct support from A-class disciplines, but the 985 platform still attracts liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a relatively high social popularity (recommended), Public Administration has average social popularity (wait and see), and Russian, as a foreign language major, has average social popularity (wait and see). In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Qinghai Province general college entrance examination is 48,000, a slight increase from 47,669 in 2025 (History Category 17,212 + Physics Category 30,457), leading to a minor intensification of competition. The university is located in Xianyang, Shaanxi, in the northwest region, which has natural geographical affinity for Qinghai candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2024 baseline ranking of 688, the expansion of the History Category enrollment plan to 6 in 2026 (a 50% increase from 4 in 2024 for liberal arts), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, and a slight increase in total candidates, the expansion rate (50%) far exceeds the candidate growth rate (about 1%), so competition is expected to ease significantly, with the ranking number increasing (easier to enter). The predicted minimum ranking is about 805, with a range of 660–950.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 660–950, it is recommended to aim for Law as a stretch goal, Public Administration as the main target, and Russian as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<660), focus on Law as a stretch; if your ranking is near the upper limit (>950), it is advisable to use Russian as a safety to ensure entry into the 985 platform.
